summary: Iteration 33 - Admin Accounting System Testing Complete. All backend APIs verified working: GET /api/admin/accounting/summary (complete financial data), GET /api/admin/accounting/transactions (all transaction types with filters), GET /api/admin/accounting/export/excel (valid Excel file), GET /api/admin/accounting/export/pdf (valid PDF file). Frontend Comptabilité tab displays all metrics correctly with date range filter, transaction type filters, and export buttons. Admin withdrawals management verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Accounting summary endpoint correctly calculates: revenue (orders + subscriptions), commissions (5% orders + management fees + 12% investments), cashback (distributed - used - withdrawn = liability)
Transactions endpoint supports filtering by type (order, subscription, cashback, withdrawal, payment) and date range
Excel export generates 3 sheets: Résumé (summary), Transactions (all transactions), Abonnements (subscriptions detail)
PDF export uses reportlab with formatted tables and color-coded sections
Admin access properly restricted - non-admin users get 403 Forbidden
Stripe webhook endpoint exists and handles requests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin accounting system fully implemented and tested. Key metrics: Total revenue 2579.53 CHF, Total commissions 282.48 CHF, Cashback liability 27.35 CHF, 20 orders with average 128.98 CHF. Excel export has 3 sheets (Summary, Transactions, Subscriptions). PDF export has formatted tables with colors. Admin withdrawals management shows 3 withdrawals (1 completed, 1 pending, 1 failed).
